title: Assertion failure in rel_bin.c for MERGE INTO command
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ProductTarget (ProductID BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ProductNumber BIGINT, Color VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE ProductSource (ProductID BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ProductNumber BIGINT, Color VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO ProductSource (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Widget', 1001, 'Red');
INSERT INTO ProductTarget (Name, ProductNumber, Color) VALUES ('Gadget', NULL, 'Blue');

UPDATE ProductTarget SET Name = (SELECT Name FROM ProductSource WHERE ProductSource.ProductID = ProductTarget.ProductID), Color = COALESCE((SELECT Color FROM ProductSource WHERE ProductSource.ProductID = ProductTarget.ProductID), 'Unknown') WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ProductSource WHERE ProductSource.ProductID = ProductTarget.ProductID);
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during MERGE INTO command execution
